by
  let v := valuation L
  apply v.isEquiv_iff_eq.mp
  rw [v.isEquiv_iff_val_le_one]
  intro y
  simp only [Valuation.comp_apply]
  let O := IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.ringOfIntegers L
  have h_cont : Continuous e := RingHom.continuous e.toRingHom
  have h_max : ∀ (S : Subring L), IsCompact (S : Set L) → S ≤ O := by
    intro S hS z hz
    by_contra h
    rw [IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.mem_ringOfIntegers_iff, ← NormedField.norm_le_one_iff_val_le_one] at h ⊢
    push_neg at h
    have : Filter.Tendsto (fun n : ℕ ↦ ‖z‖ ^ n) Filter.atTop Filter.atTop := 
      Filter.tendsto_pow_atTop_of_one_lt h
    have : ¬ Metric.Bounded (S : Set L) := by
      intro h_bdd
      rcases Metric.bounded_iff_exists_norm_le.mp h_bdd with ⟨C, hC⟩
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (Filter.tendsto_atTop_atTop.mp this) (C + 1)
      specialize hC (z^n) (S.pow_mem hz n)
      rw [norm_pow] at hC
      linarith
    exact this hS.bounded
  rw [← IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.mem_ringOfIntegers_iff, ← IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.mem_ringOfIntegers_iff]
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · have : e.symm (e y) ∈ O := h_max (O.map e.symm.toRingHom) 
      (IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.ringOfIntegers.isCompact.image (RingHom.continuous e.symm.toRingHom))
      (e y) (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ h)
    simpa using this
  · exact h_max (O.map e.toRingHom) (IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.ringOfIntegers.isCompact.image h_cont) y (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ h)

by
  let O := Valued.integer L
  have h_comp : IsCompact (O : Set L) := IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.isCompact_integer
  have h_max : ∀ S : Subring L, IsCompact (S : Set L) → S ≤ O :=
    IsNonarchimedeanLocalField.isCompact_subring_le_integer
  have hc : Continuous e := continuous_of_ringHom e
  have hc_inv : Continuous e.symm := continuous_of_ringHom e.symm
  have h_le : O.map e ≤ O := h_max _ (h_comp.image hc)
  have h_le_inv : O.map e.symm ≤ O := h_max _ (h_comp.image hc_inv)
  have h_eq : O.map e = O := le_antisymm h_le (Subring.map_le_iff_le_map.mpr h_le_inv)
  refine Valued.valuation_eq_of_le_integer_iff (valuation L) ((valuation L).comp e.toRingHom) (fun y ↦ ?_) x
  rw [Valuation.comp_apply, RingEquiv.coe_toRingHom, Valued.mem_integer_iff,
    Valued.mem_integer_iff, ← SetLike.mem_coe, ← h_eq, Subring.mem_map]
  simp
